description: Slip into absolute comfort with these Comanche floaters from adidas. Perfect for casual outings, these floaters ooze style and performance. UpperLeather straps over the forefoot, midfoot and back heel to lock the foot in placeVelcro closures for forefoot and midfoot straps to offer a customised FitFoam footbed with raised weed-style lugs for all-day massaged and cushioned comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and heel, and star-shaped lugs on the mid forefoot and mid heel for enhanced grip and tractionSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
